chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-357 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 26.04.2022 Barrister Jawad Ahmed Qureshi along with his associate Mr. Osama Yousuf, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. Mr. Kamaluddin advocate for respondents No.2 to 8. ----- The subject matter of this petition is a transfer of petitioner from junior section to boys section. However, during pendency of this petition the notice was withdrawn and the petitioner is now back to the junior section. Petitioner is now aggrieved of the senior list maintained by them. This petition does not cover such scope of seniority and hence cannot be concluded and decided in this petition. If the petitioner intends to initiate proceedings for her promotion she is at liberty to initiate such proceedings, however, subject to its maintainability which is to be dealt with in accordance with law. The petition having served its purpose is dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
